name: Paratroopers Raid
short_description: In this exciting shooting game, highly trained paratroopers are sent off in waves to destroy your base. Evolve your base and weapons with each turn to fight stronger enemies. Control your weapons, adjust your aim, clear the sky of enemies, evolve and have fun.
detailed_description:
Paratroppers Raid - Defend Your Base

In this game it is important that you are prepared for battle, the sky is full of enemies, and your base is the last resort of humanity to keep freedom. As a supreme commander and with great abilities, you have a very clear mission: "Protect your base at all costs!".

Using the growing technological resources with each wave you must clear the skies of enemies and ensure peace. Adjust your shooting accuracy and enter this exciting adventure. With each wave of enemies, your weapons and your base undergo improvements, but don’t become presumptuous, your enemies also gain additional abilities to weaken you.

Starting a cannon of explosive ammunition to turn your enemies into dust this is your first line of defense, you must keep your base intact to gain the improvements, which are: laser sight, machine gun (minigun), laser cannon. In addition to improvements to each of these weapons. Your base also gains improvements in sequence of waves.

Don’t forget: "Your points are your best weapon to gain improvements in the face of the evolution of enemies". Prepare to defend humanity.

Ah, do not forget, the enemies have achieved a technology that will bomb your base in strategic waves, eliminate the bombs with your sights before they reach your base.

* Arcade Mode:

Like an arcade machine, in this mode you will face waves of enemies and collect points to climb your ranking. Earn upgrades (such as new weapons, additional life and special items) as you progress and control your arsenal wisely as your enemies also become stronger with each wave that passes, and can bombard your base from time to time.

* Long-Run Mode:

Enjoy the gameplay of the Arcade mode with the peace of mind not to miss the point where you were. In this mode, you can stop the Arcade game whenever you want, and then continue from where you left off in the previous game. This mode has no scoring ranking.

* Roguelike Mode:

A more challenging game for those who prefer a new experience with each match. In this mode you must win your improvements and items (drawn with each goal hit) with your score, and choose them very carefully, because the difficulty of the game is naturally difficult.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
